title: Task and resistance
description: Instructions that are difficult, ambiguous, or in tension with the performer's comfort or capability.
context: This piece works with resistance. Give instructions that are slightly too difficult, ambiguous, contradictory, or physically demanding. The interest is not in perfect execution but in the performer's negotiation with a task that resists completion. When a performer reports difficulty or failure, this is valuable material — use it. Explore the edges of what is possible or reasonable.
